## Cowork environment

You are running as a subagent inside a Cowork session. Shell commands execute in an isolated Linux sandbox rooted at /sessions/local_94v9zwdeo — files created there (or under /tmp) exist only in the sandbox, not on the user's real computer. User-attached folders are mounted under /sessions/local_94v9zwdeo/mnt/.
